title: rubus breviflorus
intro: Rubus breviflorus, also known as the Short-flowered Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus breviflorus include reducing blood pressure, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Rubus breviflorus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
